channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration works to rebuild US tariff wall after Supreme Court ruling
item.description: The Treasury saw revenue surge from President Trump's double-digit import taxes.

item.title: NTSB says bird strike likely caused fatal Hudson River helicopter crash
item.description: A Spanish family of five and the pilot died in the April 2025 crash.

item.title: Canadian wildfire smoke triggers US air quality alerts as trees vanish rapidly
item.description: Detroit and Minneapolis are among major cities with the worst air quality.

item.title: Teleprompter operator earned nearly $100K betting on Trump speeches
item.description: Kalshi detected suspicious activity on the operator's account, investigated, and referred the case to federal regulators.
